title: Let it Snow
description: Replace all rain with snow (client side)
body:
# PermaSnow

> **By default**, only rain is replaced with snow. You can enable permanent rain or snow in the settings via **ModMenu**.

Transform every rainy day into a winter wonderland! With PermaSnow, rain in all biomes is replaced with snow, on the client side.

Love snow even more? You can enable permanent snow, making your world a cozy, snowy landscape at all times, no matter the weather!

Fully compatible with servers, so you can enjoy the snow without affecting gameplay or other players. Embrace the eternal winter!
